basePrompt: A realistic square portrait photograph of a young {nationality} bride, composed for a 1:1 image. She is facing directly forward, looking straight into the camera, with her face centered in the frame. She has {faceShape}, with a {aura} appearance. She has {hairLength}, {hairColor}, {hairStyle}, {bangs}. Her eyes are {eyes}, with {eyelids}. She has a {nose}, {mouth}, and a {expression}. She is wearing {clothing}. Her overall presence, expression, makeup, and styling convey a {personality}. Use realistic portrait photography only, with natural skin texture, lifelike facial features, and professional studio lighting. The portrait should look like a natural, elegant, realistic wedding game result. Keep the composition clean, symmetrical, front-facing, and suitable for side-by-side comparison with a real photo. Keep the image respectful, flattering, warm, and suitable for a wedding ceremony. Do not include text, watermark, extra people, distorted face, exaggerated makeup, side profile, looking away, illustration, anime, or cartoon style.

negativePrompt: Do not create a caricature, do not create a celebrity, do not include text, do not include watermark, do not include extra people, do not make the face distorted, do not use a side profile, and do not make the subject look away from the camera.
